custom-action.name: isavailable
custom-action.description:
This action checks whether a SAP object is available or not. The result will be returned in the response or in the optional parameter.
Possible parameters are: - objectId (optional): The SAP GUI object identifier. Default value is "ses[0]/". - windowId (optional): The SAP GUI window identifier. - objectName (optional): The SAP GUI object name. - objectType (optional): The SAP GUI object type. - variable (optional): The variable name of the result. Default value is "isAvailable".
